case_title: FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CO/DBA THE FILLMORE CENTER vs. CLEVELAND, NICHOLE D. et al

THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 04/19/95 $3,475.00 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $212.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,087.00, LEASE FORFEITED
